title: Orange Tissue | 8 Sheets of Tissue Paper | 2 Packs, Each with 4 Sheets Premium Quality Tissue | Biodegradable Packaging | Each Sheet 50x70cm, Ideal for Gift Wrapping and Crafting
features: PREMIUM TISSUE PAPER - The twin pack contains 8 sheets in total (50 x 70cm a sheet). Large enough for you to wrapping gifts
ECCO FRIENDLY - The tissue is made premium grade, acid free and the inks are water soluable so please recycle after use
BIODEGRADABLE - The packs are made from Biodegrabable packaging
VERSATILE - suitable for a wide varity of applications. The tissue paper can be used for packing gifts and can be used for birthday wedding anniversary etc.
description: Product Description Plain Tissue in a rainbow of colours
